chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 228 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.1968/2019. 23.09.2025 Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the appellant. Matter is pending since 2019 without any progress. Matter was dismissed once before for non-prosecution, however, the same was restored subsequently on 02.04.2024. On 07.02.2025, following order was passed: “07.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Jawed holds brief for Ms. Masooda Siraj for appellants. Only as an indulgence, on account of absence of Ms. Masooda Siraj, the matter is adjourned to a date in office however with a caution that in case she fails to appear and proceed with the matter on the next date it shall be deemed to be dismissed for non-prosecution.” Today once again counsel holding brief seeks adjournment for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter pending since 2019. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
